codeReview.summary: The feature delivers the primary CRUD UI/API flow, but two blocking integrity gaps remain in the submitted commit: invalid user-group IDs are not validated against existing groups before writes, and deleting the final admin user is allowed.

issues.description: Create/update only validate `userGroup` as numeric (`POST` lines 225-228, `PUT` lines 347-350) and then write directly (`POST` lines 263-268, `PUT` lines 392-396/403-406) without verifying the group exists. Because `users.user_group` has a foreign-key reference to `user_groups.group_id`, non-existent group IDs can surface as unhandled DB errors instead of controlled 4xx validation responses.

`DELETE /api/admin/users/:id` deletes any existing user (lines 443-448) and does not enforce the same last-admin invariant already enforced in `PUT` (lines 379-388). This permits deleting the only remaining admin account and can leave the system without an admin principal.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The feature test suite checks last-admin demotion but misses adjacent integrity cases for last-admin deletion and invalid-group writes.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: `app/apps/server/src/__tests__/users.test.ts` includes `prevents demoting the last admin` (line 639 in commit snapshot) and basic delete tests (lines 664-709), but no test for deleting the final admin and no create/update case using a non-existent `userGroup` id.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Shared state docs do not explicitly capture the invariant that at least one admin account must always remain, despite this being critical to user-management safety.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: `/Users/nbbaier/.factory/missions/6a598d16-5593-4a62-9543-6f0eb0e142be/AGENTS.md` and `/Users/nbbaier/68kb/.factory/library/architecture.md` describe auth and route protection patterns but do not state an explicit last-admin preservation rule for user mutations.

summary: FAIL: user-crud-admin is functionally broad but has two blocking admin-integrity defects (missing existing-group validation before writes and no last-admin deletion protection) in commit 0c17a1b.
